item.title: How to Make a Fireplace Poker
item.description: A calm, step-by-step look at forging a fireplace poker from scratch, with focus on shaping, heat, and traditional shop technique.

media:content.media:title: How to Make a Fireplace Poker
media:content.media:description: A calm, step-by-step look at forging a fireplace poker from scratch, with focus on shaping, heat, and traditional shop technique.

item.title: Using a Ball-Peen Hammer Correctly
item.description: A clear look at proper ball-peen hammer use in the forge, focused on control, technique, and practical metalworking skill.

media:content.media:title: Using a Ball-Peen Hammer Correctly
media:content.media:description: A clear look at proper ball-peen hammer use in the forge, focused on control, technique, and practical metalworking skill.

item.title: Forging Candlesticks in the Forge
item.description: A blacksmithing project focused on shaping candlesticks with heat, hammer control, and careful metalwork.

media:content.media:title: Forging Candlesticks in the Forge
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project focused on shaping candlesticks with heat, hammer control, and careful metalwork.

item.title: Forging a Simple Door or Gate Hasp
item.description: A straightforward blacksmithing project showing how to forge a simple door or gate hasp with careful shaping and shop technique.

media:content.media:description: A straightforward blacksmithing project showing how to forge a simple door or gate hasp with careful shaping and shop technique.

item.title: Forging Rivet Headers
item.description: A blacksmithing look at forging rivet headers and shaping useful shop tools with heat, precision, and traditional metalworking skill.

media:content.media:title: Forging Rivet Headers
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing look at forging rivet headers and shaping useful shop tools with heat, precision, and traditional metalworking skill.

item.title: Forging Spike Nails

item.title: Adding a Pineapple Twist to a Fire Poker
item.description: A look at shaping a fire poker with a pineapple twist, highlighting forging technique and careful metalwork in the shop.

media:content.media:title: Adding a Pineapple Twist to a Fire Poker
media:content.media:description: A look at shaping a fire poker with a pineapple twist, highlighting forging technique and careful metalwork in the shop.

item.title: Forging a New Church Handle, Part 1
item.description: A calm look at forging a brand new church handle, part 1, with focus on shaping, heat, and traditional blacksmithing technique.

item.title: Forging a Spike Lizard Shape
item.description: A calm look at shaping metal by hand at the forge, exploring heat, form, and careful blacksmithing technique in a satisfying shop process.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Spike Lizard Shape
media:content.media:description: A calm look at shaping metal by hand at the forge, exploring heat, form, and careful blacksmithing technique in a satisfying shop process.
